use_cases: User authentication forms with password visibility toggle
Search inputs with optional left/right icons
Form validation with error state styling
Multi-size input fields for different form layouts
ai_summary: A versatile form input component with CVA-based variants (default, destructive, ghost) and sizes (sm through xl), featuring optional left/right icon slots, password visibility toggle, clearable functionality, and comprehensive focus/error states. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent theming and follows standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible ring styling.
